name: Nimal Perera
quote: Serendib ERP gave our team one source of truth for attendance and payroll. Approvals are now faster and far less error-prone.

name: Ayesha Fernando
quote: We rolled out department workflows in weeks, not months. The platform is intuitive and our managers actually enjoy using it.

name: Ravindu Silva
quote: Audit trails and payroll analytics helped us close monthly reports faster with better confidence in every number.

name: Nadeesha Jayasuriya
quote: Employee records, leave approvals, and role permissions are finally centralized. It removed a lot of manual follow-ups.

name: Tharindu Wijeratne
quote: The configurable approvals and clean interface made adoption smooth across our plants and regional teams.

name: Ishani Ranasinghe
quote: Loan and advance management used to be chaotic. With Serendib ERP, everything is trackable and easy to reconcile.
